E1A4 [28]Continuous197–207Murine mAb; non-neutralizing
IGH526 [23, 29]Discontinuous313–327Weakly neutralizing, cross-reactive (1a, 1b, 4a, 5a, 6a)

AP33 [25, 31, 32]Continuous412–423Murine mAb; L413, N415, G418, and W420 required for binding; potent, cross-reactive

AR3A/B/C/D [15, 33]DiscontinuousNeutralizing face of E2cPotent, broadly neutralizing; overlaps the CD81 binding site
